acceptanceCriteria.outcome: Admin can review a pending seller's application and approve them
An approved seller appears in the public sellers list within 30 s
Admin can publish a fixed-discount coupon that is immediately redeemable at checkout

rows.outcome: Admin opens the pending sellers queue and sees the new application
Admin clicks Approve and the application leaves the pending queue
Approved seller appears in the public sellers list within 30 s
Admin publishes coupon JRN190273 (50,000 VND fixed discount, 30-day TTL)
Admin logs out and the journey state is persisted for the next chapter
